$comment: vSANBR default configuration. Override any section via -ConfigPath. Values edited in the output xlsx Assumptions sheet are for what-if analysis and do not persist back here.

vsan.$comment: Default policy applied to ALL vSAN datastores unless an entry in 'overrides' matches. dedupCompressionRatio of 1.5 is a conservative industry average and is FLAGGED in the output whenever it is used without customer-supplied data.

buckets.$comment: Order matters. First match wins. 'exclude: true' removes the bucket from the logical TiB total (with an audit note).
buckets.name: Local VMFS (excluded)
buckets.excludeReason: ESXi boot/scratch datastores not in migration scope
